text:
On Thursday 25 January 2007 03:50 pm, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of www/dansguardian-devel,
>
> Please note that PR ports/108359 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/108359

I approve of this patch.  Thanks.

--
